description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring alternating parallel stripes of light gray and black, giving it a visually striking, modern appearance. The block is solid and robust, with clean, sharp edges and a uniform thickness throughout. The striped pattern runs lengthwise across the top, while the sides are predominantly black, providing a strong contrast to the lighter top surface. The material appears to be a dense stone, possibly granite or concrete, with a slightly rough, matte finish. There are no visible engravings, markings, or signs of significant weathering on the surfaces. Its size and design suggest it could serve as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment, such as a sidewalk or plaza.
description: A rectangular stone block with a striped gray and black top surface and solid black sides, featuring a robust, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped top surface and solid black front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lengthwise orientation of the stripes and the solid black side.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the striped top and black rear face visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the lengthwise stripes and solid black side.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a leveled gravel base
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained with no chips or erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
